author: erikars
description: Organizes all of the tasks within your files into a kanban view.

manifest.author: Chris Kerr, Erika Rice Scherpelz
manifest.description: Organizes all of the tasks within your files into a kanban view. Reduce duplication of effort when managing and prioritising tasks by simply using the task format in your files to automatically appear in your Task List Kanban.
manifest.name: Task List Kanban

name: Task List Kanban

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
It's Task List Kanban 2.0! On the surface, this looks like a style change plus a group by file option. But underneath, this changes the rendering from column based to grid based. This is the prerequisite for adding a lot more swimlane/group by functionality. (Coming soon: more expansive task properties that can leverage this flexibility.)

## Features

- Added file-based swimlanes so boards can group tasks by source file across horizontal and vertical flow directions. Partially addresses [#11](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/11)
- Added drag-and-drop support for file swimlanes, allowing tasks to move between source files while also updating their target column. 
- Reworked board rendering around a shared matrix model, giving grouped and ungrouped boards the same underlying layout behavior across left-to-right, right-to-left, top-to-bottom, and bottom-to-top flows.

## Internal Changes

- Extracted reusable board layout pieces, including shared column headers, board cells, and matrix derivation logic.
- Updated the Svelte dev dependency from `5.53.12` to `5.56.0` [#129](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/pull/129)

## Verification

- `npm run build`
- `npm test`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed an issue where the vault root folder (represented by `""`) was incorrectly evaluated as falsy in folder scope checks and exclude filter path matching, preventing tasks at the root of the vault from being loaded. Fixes [#126](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/126)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

### Column settings
- Reworked column configuration into a structured editor with per-column controls for labels, colors, visibility, and drag reordering, making column setup much easier to manage on each board. Prep for changes below.
- Added explicit tag-based column mapping so column labels can differ from the tags that place tasks into them, including migration support when match rules change. Refs [#32](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/32) 
- Added support for renaming the built-in `Uncategorized` and `Done` columns, with custom names. Ref [#13](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/13)
- Added multi-tag column matching with AND semantics, allowing a column to require multiple tags and prefer the most specific matching column when rules overlap. Refs [#31](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/31) 

### Other
- Improved the affordance for adding a task to a different file. Refs [#111](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/111) 
- Fixed board totals so Done tasks no longer inflate the main board count. Refs [#119](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/119) 
- Fixed the collapsed Done column so its archive action remains available even when the column is collapsed. Refs [#120](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/120) 


## Internal Changes

- Upgraded Vite to resolve Dependabot alerts. 
- Updated the test vault
- Cleaned up tests to have less redundant setup

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes

  - Fixed board corruption when a user column named "Done" collides with the built-in done column. Existing settings with this
  collision now gracefully ignore the redundant column. The settings UI also blocks saving when a column name conflicts with a
  built-in column. Fixes https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/110

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes

  - Use Obsidian's font size setting for kanban content, so boards respect the user's configured text size. https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/106
  - Support native Obsidian link modifiers (ctrl/cmd+click behavior) https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/107
  - Suppress known svelte-select compiler warnings in build output

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- One-click add task — When a default task file is set, clicking "Add new" immediately creates a task without showing the file picker dropdown. Also remembers the last used file for one-click add. Fixes https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/34 (https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/cab5a90)
- Inline task creation — After selecting a file (or when a file is already selected), a text input appears directly on the board to name your new task immediately, removing the need to find it in the file list. Fixes https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/92 (https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/3cfa951)
- Duplicate task — New "Duplicate" option in the task dropdown menu creates a copy of any task in the same file. Fixes https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/36 (https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/ce4bb19)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features

  - Exclude paths setting — Filter out directories or files from task scanning (e.g., templates)
  (https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/27)
  - Multi-folder scope — Scan tasks from multiple folders into a single kanban board (https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/10)
  - Default task file setting — Set a default file for the "Add new" menu, skipping the file picker (https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/34)
- Improved visibility of save dialogue and added a banner for unsaved changes

## Other Changes

  - Fixed dependabot security alerts in transitive dependencies
  - Deduplicated business logic across store, task, and filter modules
  - Documentation updates

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes

  - Fixed tag filter selection state not recomputing correctly from select input
  https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/96
  - (Potentially) fixed vertical scrolling not working in horizontal flow mode https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/pull/93
  - (Potentially) fixed settings gear not showing on Android tablet https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/18
  - Limited "Add new files" scope to kanban folder only https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/91
  - Replaced self-closing non-void HTML tags to resolve Svelte 5 warnings
  - Upgraded SMUI autocomplete stack for Svelte 5 compatibility

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Potential fix for [Issue 18](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/18), missing settings icon on Samsung S8.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- Added the ability to cancel tasks from within the kanban board. 
- Improved task status rendering so checkbox/status visuals better match your active Obsidian theme/plugin styling.

## Fixes

- Fixed runtime compatibility issues around Svelte component API/version mismatches that could prevent the Kanban view from opening.
- Included dependency and lockfile refreshes from the abandoned release line.

## Documentation

- Updated README content for cancellation behavior and release workflow guidance.
- Added and updated feature specs for cancellation and cancellation-marker configuration.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- **Collapsible columns** — any column can now be collapsed or expanded with a single click on the ▼/▶ button in the column header. Collapsed state persists across sessions (stored in frontmatter). Fixes https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/74
  - In horizontal flows (LTR/RTL): collapsed columns shrink to a vertical bar with the column name rotated
  - In vertical flows (TTB/BTT): collapsed columns shrink to a horizontal strip 
  - Drag-and-drop to a collapsed column moves the task without auto-expanding the column
  - Collapsing a column while in selection mode safely exits selection mode

- **Task counts** — every column header now shows a live task count (`3 tasks`, `1 task`, `0 tasks`). Collapsed columns show the bare number. Fixes https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/87

- **Board total count** — a right-aligned total appears above all columns: `Total: X tasks`. When filters are active it shows `X of Y tasks` and updates in real-time.

## Bug Fixes

- **Multi-select with Done/Select toggle and bulk drag** — Dragging any selected task moves all selected tasks to the target column at once, including collapsed columns. Fixes https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/90
- **Always show empty columns** — always show columns, even if they currently have no tasks. Fixes https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/88

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release adds column layout controls, fixing https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/80

- In addition to the default left-to-right column layout, supports right to left as well as top-to-bottom and bottom-to-top layouts.
- In top-to-bottom and bottom-to-top layouts, the column is laid out horizontally instead of vertically.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# New Features:
  - Column width configuration: Customize the width of kanban columns with flexible units (px, %, vw, rem, em)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed an issue where columns with spaces or special characters (like "In Progress" or "Done!") would generate invalid tags when serializing tasks. Tasks in these columns now correctly fall back to kebab-case tags (e.g., `#in-progress`) or their original valid tags. Fixes [#79](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/79).

## Internal Changes
- Documentation: Restructured `AGENTS.md` into domain-specific READMEs for better project organization.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

  This release addresses three bug fixes:

  - **Fixed long file names wrapping**: File names now properly wrap on task cards instead of extending past the card boundaries
  ([#70](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/70))
  - **Fixed editing newly created tasks**: Tasks created using the "Add New" button can now be edited immediately ([#71](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/71))
  - **Fixed nested tag support**: Nested tags (e.g., `#PL/C-重要`) are now properly recognized and preserved, maintaining correct case and special characters like `/`
  ([#20](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/20))

## Full Changelog

  **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/compare/1.3.1...1.3.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Update version to 1.3.1 because of update [issue](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/69#issuecomment-3553678080).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Better task interaction controls

This release improves task interaction controls by 
- Adding a checkbox which moves a task to the Done column without using the menu
- Adding support for bulk selection of tasks
- Add click based go to task support by clicking on the file name below the task (previously interactive)

# Fixes bugs
- [#62](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/62) - Move task to Done with checkbox
- [#64](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/64) - Bulk movement of tasks between columns
- [#12](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/12) - Quick move to Done without using menu
- [#7](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/7) - Click to navigate to task in file

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release Notes - v1.2.14

Improved card rendering and behavior by moving to Obsidian's native MarkdownRenderer.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed tags at line start being incorrectly interpreted as headings. Fixes [#26](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/26) [[7f3fba2](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/7f3fba262f63b9c0a78deeda37e876e79558c7c9)]
- Fixed wiki-links not being clickable or showing hover previews. Fixes [#37](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/37) [[7f3fba2](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/7f3fba262f63b9c0a78deeda37e876e79558c7c9), [62cfc58](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/62cfc58521700d72110491de5b7cacd90189466f)]
- Fixed internal/external links in task content not being clickable. Fixes [#25](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/25) [[7f3fba2](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/7f3fba262f63b9c0a78deeda37e876e79558c7c9)]

## Internal Changes

- Replaced Showdown markdown parser with Obsidian's native MarkdownRenderer for better integration and consistency with Obsidian's markdown ecosystem [[7f3fba2](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/7f3fba262f63b9c0a78deeda37e876e79558c7c9)]

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
The filters have undergone some big changes, visually and functionally: Filters are now in a collapsible sidebar. You can save filters and last filter state is remembered on reload. You can also filter by file now (one file at a time). See the README for details. 

## Features
- Added file filter allowing users to filter tasks by source file. Fixes [#54](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/54). Implemented by: [67f37e6](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/67f37e6), [34608c7](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/34608c7), [5b6230d](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/5b6230d), [59d5272](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/59d5272), [044f803](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/044f803)
- Added saved filters feature allowing users to save, delete, deselect, and quickly apply filter combinations across content, tag, and file filters. Fixes [#51](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/51) [#55](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/55). Implemented by: [99a67b6](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/99a67b6), [8cd2091](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/8cd2091), [d206fda](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/d206fda), [4be8e7a](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/4be8e7a)
- Added resizable filter sidebar with improved UX and drag handle. Implemented by: [887a3d0](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/887a3d0)

## Small Improvements
- Support for * and + list markers for tasks. Fixes [#58](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/58). Implemented by: [2459ce7](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/2459ce7)
- Persistent filter section expanded/collapsed state. Implemented by: [e0aff17](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/e0aff17)
- UI polish on filter UI. Implemented by: [e202239](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/e202239), [28c03e5](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/28c03e5)

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed memory leak by wrapping file-menu event listener in registerEvent. Fixes [#56](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/issues/56). Implemented by: [fe12e97](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/fe12e97)
- Fixed dependabot security alerts by upgrading vite to 7.0.8. Implemented by: [46c39d8](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/46c39d8)

## Internal Changes
- Converted filters from horizontal layout to vertical resizable sidebar. Implemented by: [fd976fc](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/fd976fc)
- Refactored planning artifacts: renamed plans/ to specs/ and updated naming convention. Implemented by: [e430041](https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/commit/e430041)

## What's Changed
* Add support for ignored status markers that are not treated as tasks even if they're in a tracked directory
* Reorganize the README to have a clearer "basic to advanced" flow
* Make the author value in manifest.json consistent with community list by @claremacrae in https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/pull/48

## New Contributors
* @claremacrae made their first contribution in https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/pull/48

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ErikaRS/task-list-kanban/compare/1.2.10...1.2.11
